description: Layered fragmentation rules for SMILES→HELM. Rules within a layer are applied in priority order (higher first). Lower layer numbers run first.

rules.description: Fragment backbone amide N-C(=O) bonds. N must be secondary (D2, standard NH) or N-methyl tertiary (D3) to exclude primary sidechain amides (Asn/Gln NH2, degree 1).
rules.notes: Core rule. Implemented in _find_backbone_amide_bonds(). D2/D3 filter is the key exclusion.

rules.description: Detect S-S bonds within backbone fragments and split each into individual Cys monomers, assigning [*:3] to each sulfur dummy. The S-S position becomes a HELM connection line (e.g. 3:R3-14:R3).
rules.notes: Two-pass: backbone amide cut first, then _split_disulfide() cuts any S-S bonds within resulting fragments. r3_partners tuple tracks pairing for HELM connection line generation.

rules.description: CuAAC 1,4-triazole: detect ring via SMARTS [n;r5;X3:1]1[n;r5;X2][n;r5;X2][c;r5;X3:4][c;r5;H1]1. Cut N1–C(Aha) and C4–C(Hpg) exocyclic bonds. Triazole becomes CHEM1{[Triazole14]}; Aha and Hpg get R3; HELM emits PEPTIDE1,CHEM1 cross-chain connections.
rules.notes: Two-pass: backbone amide cut first, then _split_triazole() on any fragment containing a 1,4-triazole. isotope-label convention: dummy isotope = atom index of removed partner. DB entries for Aha/Hpg/Pra updated to post-click R3 form.

rules.description: Depsipeptide ester bond O-C(=O) in backbone. Cut like amide but O-side gets R1 (hydroxyl acid monomer), C-side gets R2.
rules.notes: Needed for depsipeptides (e.g. kahalalide F). Not encountered yet.

rules.description: gamma-Glutamate: alpha-N=R1, alpha-COO=R2, gamma-COO=R3. Prevents gamma sidechain COOH being misassigned as R2 backbone terminus.
rules.notes: Critical for GLP-1 protraction linkers (Semaglutide, Liraglutide). gGlu already in DB — rule ensures correct fragmentation.

rules.description: Lysine epsilon-amine: add [*:3] to epsilon-NH2 so fragment matches DB entry with R3. Currently handled via _try_add_r3() in smiles_to_helm.py.
rules.notes: Implemented. Covers Lys, Orn, Dab, Dap (all free sidechain primary amines).

rules.description: Free cysteine thiol: add [*:3] to -SH so fragment matches DB entry with R3. Currently handled via _try_add_r3().
rules.notes: Implemented. Only fires when Cys is NOT in a disulfide (free thiol).

layer_descriptions.1: Universal — always applied. Defines where to cut.
layer_descriptions.2: Bond-type — special covalent connections (S-S, click, ester). Annotate or cut non-amide bonds.
layer_descriptions.3: Linkage-specific — correct R-group assignments for known chemistry patterns.
layer_descriptions.4: Terminal — handle chain ends (N-cap, C-amide, alcohol termini). Not yet formalised.

consolidation_rules: A new Layer 3 rule must not conflict with any existing Layer 3 rule on the same SMARTS match.
A new Layer 2 rule must be validated against all ground_truth.json entries before activation.
When a rule is superseded by a more general rule, set status=deprecated and add superseded_by field.
